# twitchan.com — for LLMs

> Curated, lightweight, multilingual adult media gallery. 18+ only.

## Purpose
twitchan.com aggregates publicly-listed video links from a third-party provider (skbj.tv) and presents them in a lightweight, fast, multilingual gallery. The site does not host media files — it embeds videos via the provider's public URLs and proxies downloads through a server-side endpoint that strips referer and forces attachment.

## Audience
Adults 18+ only. The site uses an age gate on first visit and is labeled with RTA-5042 metadata.

## Languages
18 languages auto-selected by visitor IP geolocation: English, 日本語, 中文, 한국어, Español, Français, Deutsch, Português, Русский, Italiano, العربية, हिन्दी, ไทย, Tiếng Việt, Bahasa Indonesia, Türkçe, Polski, Nederlands. Manual override is always available in the header.

## Main features
- Grid gallery with 15 items per page
- In-site iframe player
- One-click download (server-proxied, attachment disposition)
- Search by title
- Native responsive ads every 15 items
- Mobile floating ad
- 300x100 mobile banner
- 308x286 video ad inside the player
- Hidden admin panel at `/?p=admin` (4-segment password)
  - Add single by URL
  - Bulk add (one URL per line)
  - Scrape source homepage (up to 10 pages)
  - Clear all media

## Tech
Next.js 16 App Router + TypeScript + Tailwind 4 + Prisma + SQLite. Deployed on Netlify with Netlify Functions handling the admin auth gate.

## Content policy
All media is sourced from third-party providers. We do not host, store, or cache media. Takedown requests are honored — see /?p=policy.

## Important URLs
- Home: https://twitchan.com/
- About: https://twitchan.com/?p=about
- Policy: https://twitchan.com/?p=policy
- Sitemap: https://twitchan.com/api/sitemap
- Robots: https://twitchan.com/api/robots
- Admin: https://twitchan.com/?p=admin (password-protected)
